ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year the race took place */,
  "round" INTEGER /* The round number of the race in the season */,
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the circuit where the race occurred */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time the race started */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL for external information about the race */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the race */,
  "weather_type" INTEGER /* Weather type identifier */,
  "track_configuration" TEXT /* Specific configuration of the track used for the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., Grand Prix, Sprint Race) */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., Scheduled, Completed, Cancelled) */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Total distance of the race in kilometers */,
  "track_temperature" REAL /* Average track temperature during the race */,
  "air_temperature" REAL /* Average air temperature during the race */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Average humidity during the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_weather_type FOREIGN KEY ("weather_type") REFERENCES weather_types ("weather_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_races_circuit_id FOREIGN KEY ("circuit_id") REFERENCES circuits ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "circuits" (
  "circuit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each circuit */,
  "circuit_name" TEXT /* Name of the circuit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the circuit */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the circuit is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the circuit */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the circuit */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the circuit in meters */,
  "track_layout" TEXT /* URL of the track layout image */,
  "circuit_opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the circuit was opened */,
  "circuit_last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the circuit was last renovated */,
  "circuit_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the circuit in terms of spectators */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the circuit in kilometers */,
  "laps" INTEGER /* Number of laps in the race */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("circuit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_types" (
  "weather_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather type */,
  "weather_description" TEXT /* Description of the weather type */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed during the race */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Precipitation during the race (e.g., None, Light Rain, Heavy Rain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position the driver finished in */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points earned by the driver and team */,
  "qualifying_position" INTEGER /* Position the driver started in the race */,
  "fastest_lap" INTEGER /* Indicates if the driver set the fastest lap during the race */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time taken by the driver to complete the race */,
  "status" TEXT /* Indicates the status of the driver at the end of the race (e.g., Finished, DNF, DQ) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the driver is part of */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the driver */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the driver */,
  "driver_number" INTEGER /* Driver's race number */,
  "career_start_year" INTEGER /* Year the driver started their Formula 1 career */,
  "career_end_year" INTEGER /* Year the driver ended their Formula 1 career (if applicable) */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "base" TEXT /* Location of the team's base */,
  "championships" INTEGER /* Number of championships won by the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_principal" TEXT /* Name of the team principal */,
  "engine_supplier" TEXT /* Engine supplier for the team */,
  "technical_director" TEXT /* Name of the technical director */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the team's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Race Organizer, Circuit Manager, Admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)
